prompt: I'm looking at /home/mcs/Documents/git/ghyll — a Go streaming/CLI tool. Can you find the architectural hotspots and tell me what's tightly coupled or which files concentrate too much responsibility? I want a refactor shortlist, not a wall of metrics.

assertions.text: Identifies picker.go or main.go as oversized / god module
Calls out http.go fan-in or central hub role
Provides a refactor shortlist (4 or fewer headline items)
Identifies or flags the false-positive errors.go cycle (basename-collision artefact)
